title: WopFeatureRefineConfig

provider.description: AI provider id (e.g., `anthropic`, `openai`, `gemini`). MUST be in `Capabilities.aiProviders.supported`. When omitted, the host's default provider is used.

model.description: Provider-specific model id. When omitted, the host's default model is used.

systemPromptOverride.description: Override the embedded fallback system prompt. Useful when the host wants a custom decision rubric.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Default 0.2 — refinement is closer to `decide` than `create`.

description: Optional config. All fields are overrides; the executor works with defaults when omitted.
